acceptanceCovered: poi-ooxml dependency present in pom.xml and project compiles ‚Äî pom.xml diff confirms org.apache.poi:poi-ooxml:5.3.0 added; temper-results.json shows ./mvnw -q compile exit 0 and ./mvnw test 23/23 pass exit 0

ExcelImportService reads .xlsx, maps rows to Post entities, persists them, returns ImportBatch with total/success/failed counts and DONE/FAILED status ‚Äî ExcelImportService.java: XSSFWorkbook opens stream, ExcelRowMapper.mapRows() produces List<Post>, postRepository.saveAll() persists on success path; ImportBatchResponse.from(batch) returns batchId/totalRecords/successRecords/failedRecords/status; T01 asserts DONE+successRecords=2, T04 asserts FAILED+successRecords=0

POST /import-posts accepts a MultipartFile and returns the ImportBatch summary as JSON ‚Äî ImportController.java: @PostMapping consumes MULTIPART_FORM_DATA_VALUE, @RequestParam("file") MultipartFile, returns ResponseEntity<ImportBatchResponse> HTTP 200; GlobalExceptionHandler maps IllegalArgumentException‚Üí400 for invalid files

ExcelExportService writes entity rows to xlsx via reflection over annotated/declared fields ‚Äî ReflectionRowWriter.java: constructor calls getDeclaredFields() and setAccessible(true); writeHeader() iterates fields for column names; writeRow() iterates fields calling field.get(instance); ExcelExportService uses ReflectionRowWriter<ExportRowModel>

GET /export-report streams an .xlsx download containing posts joined with their latest social metrics ‚Äî ExcelExportController.java: @GetMapping("/export-report") sets Content-Type application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet and Content-Disposition attachment; ExcelExportService.buildExportBytes() calls postRepository.findByStatus(ACTIVE) then socialMetricRepository.findTop1ByPostOrderByCrawledAtDesc(post) per post; ExportRowModel carries all 13 post+metric fields

ExcelImportServiceTest covers: valid file, missing columns, empty file ‚Äî all passing ‚Äî T01 (valid 2-row file‚ÜíDONE), T02 (missing platform_post_id column‚ÜíIllegalArgumentException), T03 (header-only/empty file‚ÜíIllegalArgumentException containing "no data rows"); temper-results.json confirms 23/23 pass

Existing test suite still passes; invalid uploads return 4xx not 500 ‚Äî temper-results.json: ./mvnw test 23/23 pass exit 0 (all pre-existing tests retained); GlobalExceptionHandler maps IllegalArgumentException‚Üí400, MaxUploadSizeExceededException‚Üí400; IllegalStateException (seed user missing)‚Üí500 only for environment misconfiguration, not for invalid upload content
regressionChecked: PostRepository.findByStatus(PostStatus, Pageable) ‚Äî pre-existing paginated query untouched; new findByStatus(PostStatus) overload added without conflict
UserRepository.findByEmail ‚Äî unchanged; new findFirstByOrderByIdAsc added without conflict

GlobalExceptionHandler pre-existing handlers (ResourceNotFoundException‚Üí404, PropertyReferenceException‚Üí400, InvalidDataAccessApiUsageException‚Üí400) ‚Äî all retained; three new handlers appended (IllegalArgumentException, IllegalStateException, MaxUploadSizeExceededException)
application.properties: multipart limits (max-file-size=10MB, max-request-size=11MB) added to base profile; max-page-size=100 and pageable serialization-mode untouched
JPA open-in-view=false confirmed ‚Äî ExcelExportService @Transactional(readOnly=true) holds the session for N+1 metric loop; no LazyInitializationException regression
pom.xml: poi-ooxml 5.3.0 added; no existing dependency version changes or removals

H-1 fix verified: @Transactional on importPosts() (proxy entry); persistSuccess/persistFailure private ‚Äî all Spring Data calls join outer TX via REQUIRED propagation; BR-004 atomicity now enforced; IOException path also rolls back batch creation correctly

H-2 fix verified: null filename guard 'unknown.xlsx' at lines 65-66 before createProcessingBatch; validateFileGuard uses raw getOriginalFilename() for extension check (correct ‚Äî null there uses content-type fallback)
M-1 fix verified: IOException.getMessage() logged at WARN internally; client receives static string only ‚Äî no POI internals exposed
M-5 fix verified: buildExportBytes() at line 51 before setContentType/setHeader at lines 53-54; Spring can override status to 500 if service throws before response is committed
